alerts.title: Added: European Union (Sweden, Finland, Norway, and other EU countries seeking equivalent status) Microbiology Limits - Salmonella
alerts.country: European Union (Sweden, Finland, Norway, and other EU countries seeking equivalent status)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Special guarantees for Salmonella control are provided for Sweden, Finland, and Norway concerning trade of certain live animals and products. Other EU countries can obtain equivalent status by implementing approved control programs as per referenced regulations.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria and process hygiene criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins, and metabolites in specific foods.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. This is a technical regulation, mandatory for pre-packaged food products.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 2055-1:2015. This is a technical regulation, mandatory for products claiming to be Halal.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life periods for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 150-1:2013. This is a technical regulation, mandatory for food products.

alerts.title: Modified: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Verification of specific labelling requirements is required by consulting the full GSO 9:2022 regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Verification of specific general requirements for Halal food is required by consulting the full GSO 2055-1:2015 regulation.

alerts.title: Modified: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Verification of specific mandatory expiration date requirements is required by consulting the full GSO 150-1:2013 regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Verification of specific microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients is required by consulting the full GSO 1016:2015 regulation.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with Additive Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory Compliance. All food businesses offering food for sale in Singapore must comply with the regulatory limits on food additives.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Must be assessed for safety by SFA. New: Verification Required. Food additives must be assessed for safety by SFA before they can be used in food sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Additive Limits - Permitted Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Only SFA-assessed additives permitted. New: Only SFA-assessed additives permitted. Only food additives that have been assessed by SFA are permitted for use in food products sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Additive Limits - Unpermitted Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Do not import or sell. New: Prohibited. Do not import or sell food products containing an additive that is not permitted.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Compliance with Contaminant Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory Compliance. All food businesses must comply with the regulatory limits on incidental constituents (contaminants) in food.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminant Test Results
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Within specified limits. If laboratory test results indicate contaminants, they must be within the specified limits.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (Incidental Constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. New: Within SFA's regulatory limits. Contaminants (also known as incidental constituents) in food sold in Singapore must be within SFA’s regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants Exceeding Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Do not import or sell. New: Prohibited. Do not import or sell food products containing contaminants or incidental constituents that exceed regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary Drug Residues (Diethylstibestrol, Hexoestrol, Dienoestrol)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Regulation 33 of the Food Regulations prohibits the import or sale of meat and any food derived from meat which contains residues of diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, or dienoestrol.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Ingredients and Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory Declaration. For prepacked foods, all ingredients and additives used must be declared in the list of ingredients on food labels.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - General Labelling Compliance
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory Compliance. Food or food products must comply with general labelling requirements.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration. These allergens must be declared if present as an ingredient or food additive in prepackaged foods.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite as residue sulphur dioxide
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if 10 or more mg/kg. Sulphite must be declared if the residue sulphur dioxide is 10 or more milligrams per kilogram of food.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Food and Nutrition Labeling
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Compliance required. Food products must comply with general food labeling and nutrition labeling requirements, which implicitly covers allergen declarations and salt/sodium information.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Foods that are prohibited for production, import, or sale must not be handled.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food. Verification required against FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189).. Also includes delisted color additives (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, sesame. Identified by the Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act of 2004 (FALCPA) and the FASTER Act.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. Guidance Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - 'Gluten-free' claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet FDA's defined standard for gluten content. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods also apply.. Helps consumers with celiac disease.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen cross-contact and undeclared allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Facilities must implement allergen preventive controls as per CGMP & PC rule (21 CFR part 117), including written procedures to control cross-contact and ensure accurate labeling.. Products found to inadvertently contain allergens due to cross-contact are considered misbranded or adulterated.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label.. Identified as allergenic substances derived from insects.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens (Contains Statement)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must appear immediately after or next to the list of ingredients in a “contains” statement.. Example: “Contains wheat, milk, and soy.”

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens (Ingredient List)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must appear in parentheses following the name of the ingredient.. Example: “lecithin (soy),” “flour (wheat),” and “whey (milk)”.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of specific allergen types
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Type of tree nut, species of fish, and species of Crustacean shellfish must be declared.. Example: almonds, pecans, walnuts for tree nuts; bass, flounder, cod for fish; crab, lobster, shrimp for Crustacean shellfish.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels.. Due to potential hypersensitivity reactions.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration is ≥10 parts per million total sulfites, due to adverse reactions in sensitive individuals (e.g., asthma).

alerts.title: Modified: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database. New: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions for permitted food additives in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the database and its Preamble for specific provisions.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex standards and CCCF decisions. Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) and Guideline Levels for contaminants, which are legally permitted maximum concentrations. The General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) is the primary reference.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: New: Adherence to Code of Practice for Prevention and Reduction. A specific Code of Practice (CXC 78-2017) exists for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in Spices
alerts.details: Old: Prevention and reduction required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against Union list of food additives. New: Verification required. The EU Additives Database serves as a tool to inform about approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against food safety criteria and process hygiene criteria. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes
alerts.details: Old: Compliance with food safety criteria in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005, verified through shelf-life studies (durability studies and challenge tests). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes (on surfaces)
alerts.details: Old: Sampling procedures required on food processing areas and equipment surfaces. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - Compliance with general Halal requirements for food products, including permissible ingredients and additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 2055-1:2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Declaration of allergens on labels of prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life periods for food products
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 150-2:2013. This is a standard providing optional shelf life periods.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 150-1:2013. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Salt / Sodium Limits - Declaration of salt/sodium content on labels of prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Additive Limits - Flavoring additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Verification of specific additive limits for flavoring agents in concentrated drinks is required by consulting the full GSO 2830:2026 regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements (including composition, labelling, additives)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Verification of specific requirements for supplementary sport foods, including additive limits and labelling, is required by consulting the full GSO 2209:2026 regulation.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for genetically modified agricultural products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. This circular letter outlines provisions for the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive. Specific limits and conditions must be verified within the regulation.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - General Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations regarding general food additive limits for processed foods must be consulted from the 281 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen Declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations regarding mandatory allergen declarations for processed foods must be consulted from the 281 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - General Contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations regarding contaminant limits for processed foods must be consulted from the 281 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General Labelling
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations regarding general labelling requirements for processed foods must be consulted from the 281 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Online Sales Labelling
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation outlines supervision and labelling requirements for processed foods circulated online. Specific details must be verified within the regulation.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Categories
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General compliance for processed foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - General Microbiology
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations regarding microbiology limits for processed foods must be consulted from the 281 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations regarding salt/sodium limits for processed foods must be consulted from the 281 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for approved food additives and their usage limits.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Specifications and Standards for Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific standards and limits for food additives under the Food Sanitation Act.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues (Pesticides)
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific maximum residue limits (MRLs) for agricultural chemicals under the Positive List System.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy (BSE) related controls
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for regulations related to BSE control in food.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Radioactivity
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific limits on radioactivity in food.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Specifications and Standards for Contaminants in Food
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific contaminant limits in food under the Food Sanitation Act.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (general)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Foods produced by Recombinant DNA Techniques
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for regulations concerning foods produced by recombinant DNA techniques, potentially including labelling requirements.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - General Food Safety Principles
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for the fundamental principles and framework of food safety as outlined in the Food Safety Basic Law.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - General Food Sanitation
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for general food sanitation requirements as stipulated by the Food Sanitation Law.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Health Claims, Food for Special Dietary Uses, Nutrition Labeling
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific requirements for health claims, foods for special dietary uses, and nutrition labeling.
